SFDC_EXT_STORE_LOCATOR.name: Store Locator
SFDC_EXT_STORE_LOCATOR.description: Store Locator allows a shopper to find the closest store to them.

SFDC_EXT_SOCIAL_LOGIN.name: Social Login
SFDC_EXT_SOCIAL_LOGIN.description: Social login allows a shopper to sign in with their social media account.

SFDC_EXT_WISHLIST.name: Wishlist
SFDC_EXT_WISHLIST.description: Wishlist allows a shopper to add products to their wishlist.

SFDC_EXT_INTERNAL_THEME_SWITCHER.name: Theme Switcher
SFDC_EXT_INTERNAL_THEME_SWITCHER.description: Theme Switcher allows a developer to switch the theme of the store.
